mapper.insert: insert into member(memberNo,memberId,memberPassword,memberName,memberNickname,memberEmail,memberPhoneNo,memberGender) values ((SELECT NVL(MAX(memberNo), 0) + 1 FROM member), #{memberId}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName}, #{memberNickname},#{memberEmail},#{memberPhoneNo},#{memberGender})
mapper.select: select count(*) from member where memberId = #{memberId}
select count(*) from member where memberNickname = #{memberNickname}
SELECT memberNo, memberId, memberPassword, memberName, memberNickname, memberPhoneNo, memberRole FROM member WHERE memberId = #{memberId}
SELECT memberEmail,memberNickname,naverLogin FROM member WHERE memberEmail = #{email }
SELECT memberNo, memberId, memberName, memberNickname, memberEmail, memberPhoneNo, memberGender, memberRole FROM member WHERE memberEmail = #{email} AND NAVERLOGIN = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET NAVERLOGIN = #{id } WHERE memberEmail = #{email }
mapper.insert: insert into member (memberNo, memberId, memberPassword, memberName, memberNickname, memberEmail, memberPhoneNo, memberGender, memberRole, naverLogin) values ((SELECT NVL(MAX(memberNo), 0) + 1 FROM member), #{email}, #{id}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{mobile}, #{gender}, 'USER', #{id})
